metadata.title: Mai Ƙidaya Kalmomi da Haruffa Kyauta – Duba Tsayin Rubutu don SEO
metadata.description: Ƙidaya kalmomi, haruffa, saƙon-saƙo da lokacin karantawa nan da nan. Duba mafi kyawun tsayin rubutu don SEO – labaran blog, shafukan kayan, shafukan saukowa. Ba buƙatar rajista.

hero.title: Mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa tare da kimantawar tsayi
hero.description: Liƙa rubutun ka, zaɓi nau'in shafi, kuma kayan aikin zai nuna adadin kalmomi, adadin haruffa, saƙon-saƙo, kuma ya kimanta ko tsayin ya dace da wannan nau'in abun ciki

software.name: Mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa kyauta ta yanar gizo
alternateName: Mai ƙidaya kalmomi tare da kimantawar tsayin rubutu
Mai ƙidaya haruffa ta yanar gizo
Kayan aikin ƙidaya kalmomi don marubutan kwafi
Mai ƙidaya kalmomi ta yanar gizo
Duba nawa kalmomi rubutu ke da shi
Mafi kyawun tsayin rubutu don labarin blog
software.description: Mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa kyauta. Yana duba adadin kalmomi, haruffa, saƙon-saƙo, da kimantaccen lokacin karantawa. Yana kimanta tsayin rubutu don nau'ikan shafuka daban-daban: bayanin kayan, shafin sabis, babban shafi, shafin saukowa, labarin blog, jagora.
featureList: Adadin haruffa tare da sarari da ba tare da sarari ba
Kimantawar tsayin rubutu don nau'ikan shafuka daban-daban
Kewayon da ake ba da shawara don: bayanin kayan, shafin sabis, babban shafi, shafin saukowa, labarin blog, jagora

howTo.name: Yadda ake amfani da mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa
howTo.description: Duba tsayin rubutun ka kuma kimanta ko ya dace da takamaiman nau'in shafi. Koyi nawa kalmomi bayanin kayan, shafin sabis, labarin blog, ko jagora ya kamata ya kasance.

steps.name: Zaɓi nau'in shafi
steps.text: Zaɓi daga jerin zaɓi nau'in shafin da kake rubuta wa. Kowane nau'i yana da kewayon adadin kalmomi daban-daban da ake ba da shawara.

steps.name: Liƙa rubutun ka
steps.text: Liƙa ko rubuta rubutu a cikin filin rubutu. Kayan aikin zai ƙidaya kalmomi, haruffa (tare da sarari da ba tare da sarari ba), saƙon-saƙo, da kimanta lokacin karantawa ta atomatik.

steps.name: Duba kimantawar
steps.text: Duba sandar ci gaba mai launi da matsayi. Kore yana nufin kyakkyawan tsayi, rawaya yana nufin gajere sosai, ja yana nufin tsawo sosai.

steps.name: Kwafa rahoton
steps.text: Maɓallin Kwafa Rahoto yana kwafa taƙaitaccen bayani tare da dukan ƙididdiga da kimantawar tsayi zuwa clipboard.

contentBlocks.title: Mai ƙidaya kalmomi kyauta ta yanar gizo - ƙidaya da kimanta tsayin rubutu
contentBlocks.html:
Wannan kayan aikin ƙidaya kalmomi yana ba ka damar duba tsayin kowane rubutu cikin sauri. Liƙa abun cikin ka kuma mai ƙidaya zai tattara kalmomi, haruffa, da saƙon-saƙo. Za ka kuma ga nawa mintuna ake buƙata don karantawa da kuma ko tsayin ya dace da nau'in shafin da ka zaɓa.

Kowane nau'in shafi yana da manufa daban - bayanin kayan yana amsa tambayoyin mai saya, labarin blog yana rufe batu a zurfi, kuma shafin sabis yana bayyana abin da abokin ciniki zai karɓa. Mai ƙidaya yana nuna kewayon don kowane ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan nau'ikan bisa binciken abun cikin da ke da kyakkyawan matsayi.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa
contentBlocks.description: Duba tsayin rubutu yana ɗaukar ƙasa da minti guda:

items.title: 1. Zaɓi nau'in shafi
items.description: Zaɓi daga jerin zaɓi nau'in shafin da kake rubuta wa. Kowane nau'i yana da mafi ƙarancin da mafi yawan adadin kalmomi daban-daban da ake ba da shawara.

items.title: 2. Liƙa rubutun ka
items.description: Liƙa ko rubuta rubutu a cikin babban filin a hannun dama. Kayan aikin zai ƙidaya kalmomi, haruffa (tare da sarari da ba tare da sarari ba), saƙon-saƙo, da kimanta lokacin karantawa nan da nan.

items.title: 3. Duba kimantawar
items.description: Duba sandar ci gaba mai launi da matsayi. Kore yana nufin kyakkyawan tsayi, rawaya yana nufin gajere sosai, ja yana nufin tsawo sosai. A ƙasa za ka sami shawarar da ta taimaka.

items.title: 4. Kwafa rahoton
items.description: Maɓallin Kwafa Rahoto yana kwafa taƙaitaccen bayani tare da adadin kalmomi, adadin haruffa, saƙon-saƙo, lokacin karantawa, da kimantawar tsayi zuwa clipboard.

contentBlocks.title: Abin da mai ƙidaya ke auna - kalmomi, haruffa, lokacin karantawa
contentBlocks.description: Mai ƙidaya yana bin diddigin ma'auni biyar masu muhimmanci:

items.title: Kalmomi
items.description: Jimlar adadin kalmomi. Wannan shine babban alamar tsayin rubutu.

items.title: Haruffa (tare da sarari)
items.description: Dukan haruffa ciki har da sarari. Yana da amfani lokacin da CMS yana da iyakar haruffa (misali, jerin kasuwa).

items.title: Haruffa (ba tare da sarari ba)
items.description: Baƙaƙe, lambobi, da alamomin rubutu kawai. Wani lokaci ana buƙata ta hanyar shagunan bugu ko don lissafin fassara.

items.title: Saƙon-saƙo
items.description: Nawa tubalan rubutu da aka raba da layukan fanko kake da su. Yana taimakawa wajen kimanta ko rubutun yana da kyakkyawan tsari.

items.title: Lokacin karantawa
items.description: Mai lissafin lokacin karantawa yana nuna nawa mintuna ake buƙata don karanta rubutun a matsakaicin gudu na kalmomi 200 a minti guda.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake fassara sakamakon
contentBlocks.subtitle: Matsayin kimantawa
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Kyakkyawan tsayiRubutu yana cikin kewayon
Ƙasan kewayonRubutu ya fi gajerta fiye da na al'ada
Saman kewayonRubutu ya fi tsawo fiye da na al'ada
Ci gaba1200 / 1200–3000
contentBlocks.html:
Sandar ci gaba mai launi da matsayi suna taimaka maka kimanta tsayin rubutu cikin sauri:

  • Kyakkyawan tsayi (kore) - rubutun yana cikin kewayon kusan na nau'in shafin da aka zaɓa.
  • Ƙasan kewayon (rawaya) - rubutun ya fi gajerta fiye da na al'ada don wannan nau'in shafi. Idan yana amsa dukan tambayoyin mai karantawa, tsayin na iya zama daidai.
  • Saman kewayon (ja) - rubutun ya fi tsawo fiye da na al'ada. Idan kowane saƙon-saƙo yana ƙara sabuwar bayani, tsayin ya cancanta.

Kewayon suna dogara ne bisa binciken abun cikin da ke da kyakkyawan matsayi a cikin injunan bincike. Idan rubutun yana amsa tambayoyin mai karantawa, tsayin ya dace ko ta yaya sakamakon mai ƙidaya.

contentBlocks.title: Nawa kalmomi ya kamata rubutu ya kasance - mafi kyawun tsayi don SEO
contentBlocks.html:
Kewayon da ke ƙasa suna dogara ne bisa binciken abun cikin da ke da kyakkyawan matsayi a cikin injunan bincike. Tsayin rubutu da kansa ba ya shafar matsayin Google - abin da ke da muhimmanci shine ko abun cikin yana amsa tambayoyin mai karantawa.

Nau'in shafiKewayonYaushe ya fi gajerta, yaushe ya fi tsawo?
Bayanin kayanKalmomi 80–400Kayan mai sauƙi (misali, kofi) - kalmomi 80–150. Kayan da suka fi rikitarwa (misali, kwamfutar tafi-da-gidanka) - kalmomi 300–400, saboda masu saya suna da tambayoyi da yawa.
Shafin sabisKalmomi 500–1500Sabis na gida (misali, mai gyaran bututu) - kalmomi 500–700. Sabis na B2B tare da tsari da FAQ - kalmomi 1,200–1,500.
Babban shafiKalmomi 400–1000Babban shafin yana isar da babbar ƙima kuma yana jagorantar baƙi gaba - rubutun yana tallafawa kewayawa, ba don maye gurbin ƙananan shafuka ba.
Shafin saukowaKalmomi 600–2500Tayin mai sauƙi - kalmomi 600–1,000. Tayin da ke buƙatar bayyanar tsari, nau'ikan, da magance ƙin yarda - kalmomi 1,500–2,500.
Labarin blogKalmomi 1200–3000Amsa ga tambaya mai sauƙi - kalmomi 1,200–1,800. Batu mai rikitarwa tare da bangarori da yawa - kalmomi 2,000–3,000.
JagoraKalmomi 2500–6000Batu mai ƙunƙunta - kalmomi 2,500–3,500. Batu mai faɗi tare da matakai da misalai da yawa - kalmomi 4,000–6,000.

contentBlocks.title: Wa ne mai ƙidaya kalmomi ta yanar gizo ke yi wa?
contentBlocks.description: Kayan aikin ƙidaya kalmomi don marubutan kwafi da sauransu - ga waɗanda suka fi amfani da mai ƙidaya:

items.title: Marubutan kwafi da masu ƙirƙirar abun ciki
items.description: Duba ko rubutun yana cikin kewayon da ake ba da shawara don takamaiman nau'in shafi. Mai ƙidaya kalmomi na SEO yana taimakawa wajen kimanta ko labarin ya ishe.

items.title: Masu rubutun blog
items.description: Lura da tsayin labari don kiyaye bugawa a daidai. Duba lokacin karantawa kafin bugawa.

items.title: Masu shagunan kasuwanci ta yanar gizo
items.description: Tabbatar da bayanin kayan dangane da iyakar haruffa a kan dandamalin sayarwa (Amazon, eBay, Etsy).

items.title: Ƙwararrun SEO
items.description: Kimanta ko abun cikin shafi yana da mafi kyawun tsayi idan aka kwatanta da masu fafatawa. Bincika rabo na kalmomi-zuwa-batu.

items.title: Ɗalibai da masana ilimi
items.description: Duba ko takarda ta cika adadin kalmomi ko haruffa da ake buƙata.

items.title: Masu fassara
items.description: Ƙidaya haruffa ba tare da sarari ba don ƙididdigan fassara (al'adar lissafin kuɗi).

contentBlocks.title: Iyakar haruffa a kan dandamali masu shahara
contentBlocks.html:
Mai ƙidaya haruffa yana da amfani lokacin da ake ƙirƙirar abun ciki don dandamali masu ƙuntatawan tsayi:

Dandali / AbuIyakar haruffaBayanan kula
Google - taken metaHaruffa 50–60Ana yanke taken da suka fi tsawo a cikin sakamakon bincike.
Google - bayanin metaHaruffa 150–160Bayanin da ake gani ƙasan hanyar haɗi a cikin sakamakon bincike.
Amazon - taken kayanHaruffa 200Gajeren take, takamaiman tare da kalmomi masu mahimmanci.
Amazon - maki na gangaHaruffa 500 kowaneHar zuwa maki 5 na ganga da ke bayanin muhimman fasalolin kayan.
X (Twitter) - bugawaHaruffa 280Iyakar al'ada don masu amfani na yau da kullum.
LinkedIn - bugawaHaruffa 3,000Bayan haruffa ~210 hanyar haɗi ta "duba ƙari" tana bayyana.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa ya bambanta?

items.title: Nau'ikan shafuka shida tare da kewayon da ake ba da shawara
items.description: Bayanin kayan, shafin sabis, babban shafi, shafin saukowa, labarin blog, da jagora - kowane nau'i yana da kewayon sa bisa bincike.

items.title: Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida
items.description: Ba a taɓa aika rubutun ka zuwa kowane sabar ba - ana yin dukan bincike a cikin na'urar ka ta gida.

items.title: Kimantawar tsayin rubutu
items.description: Ba kawai kana ƙidaya kalmomi ba - kana samun bayani kan ko tsayin ya dace da nau'in shafin da aka zaɓa.

items.title: Kewayon da suka dogara kan SEO
items.description: Tsayin da ake ba da shawara suna dogara ne bisa binciken abun cikin da ke da kyakkyawan matsayi a cikin injunan bincike.

items.title: Lokacin karantawa
items.description: Nan da nan kana sanin nawa mintuna masu karantawa za su ɗauka don karanta rubutun.

items.title: Kwafa rahoto
items.description: Maɓallin Kwafa Rahoto yana kwafa taƙaitaccen bayani tare da dukan ƙididdiga da kimantawar tsayi zuwa clipboard.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai ƙidaya kalmomi da haruffa

items.question: Shin tsayin rubutu yana shafar matsayin Google?
items.answer: Tsayin rubutu da kansa ba shi ne abin tantance matsayi ba. Google yana kimanta ko abun cikin yana amsa tambayar mai amfani kuma yana da ƙima a gare su. Gajeren rubutu da ke amsa tambaya sosai na iya samun kyakkyawan matsayi - abin da ke da muhimmanci shine ƙima ga mai karantawa. Kewayon a cikin wannan kayan aikin suna dogara ne bisa binciken abun cikin da ke da kyakkyawan matsayi a cikin sakamakon bincike.
items.answerSchemaText: Tsayin rubutu ba shi ne abin tantance matsayi kai tsaye ba. Google yana kimanta ƙimar abun ciki don mai amfani.

items.question: Me ya sa kewayon kalmomi suka yi faɗi?
items.answer: Nau'in shafi ɗaya na iya buƙatar tsayi daban-daban dangane da rikitarwar batu. Bayanin kayan mai sauƙi (misali, kofi) kalmomi 80–150 ne - kayan aiki kawai, ƙarfi, da amfani. Bayanin kwamfutar tafi-da-gidanka kalmomi 300–400 ne saboda masu saya suna tambaya game da mai sarrafa, ƙwaƙwalwa, allo, da batir. Haka ma tare da sabis: shafin mai gyaran bututu na gida kalmomi 500–700 ne, yayin da cikakken shafin aiwatar da sabis na B2B tare da matakan tsari da FAQ kalmomi 1,200–1,500 ne.
items.answerSchemaText: Bambancin yana zuwa daga rikitarwar batu - kayan mai sauƙi yana buƙatar ƙarancin kalmomi fiye da mai rikitarwa.

items.question: Yaya ya kamata in fassara "gajere sosai" ko "tsawo sosai"?
items.answer: Kimantawar tana nuna inda rubutun ka ke dangane da abun ciki na al'ada na wannan nau'in. Idan an yi wa rubutun alama "gajere sosai" amma yana amsa dukan tambayoyin mai karantawa - tsayin ya dace. Idan "tsawo sosai" ne amma kowane saƙon-saƙo yana ƙara sabuwar bayani - tsayin ya cancanta.
items.answerSchemaText: Kimantawar tana nuna inda rubutun ke dangane da abun ciki na al'ada. Idan rubutun yana amsa tambayoyin mai karantawa, tsayin ya dace.

items.question: Yaya mai lissafin lokacin karantawa ke aiki?
items.answer: Kayan aikin yana raba adadin kalmomi da 200 - matsakaicin gudu na karantawa don rubutu na al'ada. Rubutu na fasaha ko mai wahala (misali, takardu, sharuɗɗan sabis) za a karanta a hankali. Labarin rayuwa mai sauƙi - da sauri. Sakamakon kimantaccen ƙima ne da ke taimakawa wajen kimanta nawa lokaci mai karantawa zai yi tare da rubutun.
items.answerSchemaText: Kayan aikin yana ɗaukar matsakaicin gudu na karantawa na kalmomi 200 a minti guda. Wannan kimantaccen ƙima ne don rubutu na al'ada.

items.question: Daga ina kewayon da ake ba da shawara suka fito?
items.answer: Kewayon suna dogara ne bisa binciken abun cikin da ke da kyakkyawan matsayi a cikin injunan bincike da kuma mafi kyawun al'adun ƙirƙirar abun ciki. An yi su da faɗi da gangan saboda nau'in shafi ɗaya na iya buƙatar tsayi daban-daban dangane da masana'anta, rikitarwar batu, da buƙatun mai karantawa. Kewayon suna aiki a matsayin farkon kimanta ko rubutu yana cikin kewayon al'ada don takamaiman nau'in shafi.
items.answerSchemaText: Kewayon suna dogara ne bisa binciken SEO da mafi kyawun al'adun ƙirƙirar abun ciki.

items.question: Zan iya kwafa rahoton tare da ƙididdiga?
items.answer: Eh. Ƙasan ƙididdiga za ka sami maɓallin Kwafa Rahoto - yana kwafa taƙaitaccen bayani tare da adadin kalmomi, adadin haruffa, saƙon-saƙo, lokacin karantawa, da kimantawar tsayi zuwa clipboard. Za ka iya liƙa shi a cikin takarda ko aika shi ga abokan aiki.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh. Danna maɓallin Kwafa Rahoto ƙasan ƙididdiga. Za a kwafa taƙaitaccen bayani tare da dukan ma'auni da kimantawa zuwa clipboard.
